tasks.title: Write the complete RLS policy for the pages table
tasks.prompt: From memory, write the SQL to: (1) enable RLS on the pages table, (2) create a RESTRICTIVE workspace isolation policy, (3) create the trigger function that the policy uses. Do not reference the lesson — reproduce the exact pattern.
success_criteria: ALTER TABLE pages ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY
No use of superuser-level SET — the policy uses current_setting()

tasks.title: Debug the Memory Query
tasks.prompt:
Review this vector search query and identify every violation of Meridian's architecture rules:

```sql
SELECT memory_key, memory_value
FROM user_memory
WHERE user_id = $1
ORDER BY embedding <-> $2 LIMIT 10;
```
success_criteria: Identifies missing workspace_id = $N in WHERE clause
Identifies wrong operator: <-> (L2 distance) should be <=> (cosine distance)
Identifies no distance threshold filter (should add: AND distance < 0.3 using a subquery or CTE)
